title: Hapfish Rechargeable Battery Powered Lights, Led Strip Light Bar Battery Operated 4000mAh Magnetic Dimmable Remote Control, Under Shelf Lighting for Mirror Indoor Wall Cabinet Kitchen - Black
features: 【Adjustable Brightness and Color Temperature】The battery powered LED lights feature 70 high-brightness beads, with a maximum brightness of 300lm. It can stepless dimming and offers 3 color temperatures (3000K/4500K/6000K), suitable for indoor, wall, mirror, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, and cabinet.

【Long Battery Life】Built-in 4000mAh USB rechargeable battery, this strip light bar can operate for 60 hours at the lowest power and 10 hours at the highest power. It only takes 4 hours to fully charge.

【Easy Touch & Remote Control】The light body comes with sensitive touch buttons for easy adjustment of brightness and color temperature. Additionally, this rechargeable under shelf light comes with a remote control that allows for remote operation and timer functions (15/30/60 minutes). It can also remember your last setting.

【Easy Installation】It has a strong built-in magnet that can securely attach to any iron surface. Additionally, you can use the included double-sided adhesive snap and screws to attach it or securely fix it in any desired location. To protect your furniture, this product uses water-based gel that does not damage your furniture when removed.

【What You Get】Hapfish Battery operated LED light strip x1, remote control x1, USB charging cable x1, magnetic base x1, double-sided adhesive snap x2, screws x3, multilingual user manual x1, 24x7 customer service, and lifetime warranty.
